title.en: You must know that every branch must be in char...

content.en:
Baili Zhenjun didn't expect that Wanfa Daozi would become so powerful, and not long after he was promoted to a half-step True Spirit, he destroyed several branches of the Demon Yin Sect.

You must know that every branch must be in charge of a true monarch!

Even if some true monarchs are not strong, they are also true monarchs, and with the blessing of the formation, their strength will not be weak.

In addition, the Phantom Sound True Monarch has fallen!

This is a powerful True Monarch who is enough to rank in the top five of the Demon Sound Sect, and he actually died at the hands of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi.

"How can this be, Wanfa Daozi is just a strong life-saving ability, and his strength is not too rebellious. It is okay for the Heavenly Monarch to kill a half-step True Spirit by leaping over the level, but the half-step True Spirit is overstepping to kill a genius True Monarch like the Phantom Sound True Monarch, how is this possible?"

Baili Zhenjun couldn't imagine how Wanfa Daozi did it!

Even in the chaos of the Demon Sound Sect, the Dao Ancestor Sect is far from being able to do this at the half-step True Monarch level, and the Demon Sound Sect has also entered a few True Sect disciples this time, which is not weaker than the Dao Ancestor Sect, and it is not so demonic at all!

Moreover, he himself is a true disciple, so he naturally understands how rebellious it is for the half-step true spirit to leapfrog and kill the Phantom Sound True Monarch.

"It's definitely not normal, could it be that Wanfa Daozi used some treasure?"

Baili Zhenjun guessed.

But no matter what Ye Tian did, now that Ye Tian is facing the Demon Sound Sect, the two sides are already dying, if they can't kill Ye Tian, the son of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao, then the Demon Sound Sect will be finished.

The other side.

The Void Heaven Palace's Moon Swallowing True Monarch and the others also knew that Ye Tian had killed the Demon Sound Sect, and they were immediately shocked.

They summoned Ye Tian one by one and asked Ye Tian to come back.

"Daozi is too reckless, he is only a half-step True Spirit, the Demon Sound Sect is not hundreds of millions of years ago, the current Demon Sound Sect has dozens of True Monarchs!"

"Swallowing Moon True Monarch, Daozi sent us a message to tell us not to worry, he alone is enough to save his life!"

"We know the means of Daozi to save his life, but Daozi is only a half-step true spirit, and he may not be able to withstand the siege and killing of many true monarchs!"

"Don't forget, Daozi has a great realm, as long as you don't get killed by a single blow, you can definitely escape easily!"

Pengyu Tianjun said.

"What if the Great Realm Shift is targeted? The Demon Sound Sect has a lot of background, and no one knows if they have the formation and means to ban the Great Realm Shift. "Swallowing the Moon True Monarch said.

After discussing with the others, they decided to observe first, and if Ye Tian couldn't stop it, they would come to the rescue.

......

There are quite a few branches of the Demon Sound Sect, about twenty or so.

No one knew which branch Ye Tian would attack, plus there were dozens of True Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect, and it was impossible for them all to be concentrated in one branch, so under Ye Tian's attack, the branches of the Demon Sound Sect were destroyed one by one.

In the end, the Demon Sound Sect had no choice but to abandon these branches, and all the manpower was concentrated in the headquarters, temporarily retreating.

Of course, it is impossible for those branches to be left unguarded, just some weak Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals, to maintain order in those territories, otherwise if they all retreat, then these areas will fall into chaos.

In addition, the Demon Yin Sect was afraid that Ye Tian would kill those weak Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals, so they released the news, saying that they had transferred all the half-step True Spirits and True Monarchs back to the Demon Yin Sect.

And let Ye Tian have the courage to go to the headquarters of the Demon Sound Sect, if he dares to kill the weak Heavenly Monarch and Divine General of the Demon Sound Sect, then he is not worthy of being the Dao Ancestor.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian would undoubtedly be condemned if he still went to destroy those branches that did not have a true monarch and a half-step true spirit in charge.

After all, even in chaos, it is normal for the strong to fight with the strong, but if the strong abuse the weak, it is a bit excessive.

A branch of the Demon Sound Sect.

Ye Tian probed and found that there were indeed no half-step True Spirits and Heavenly Monarchs here, and even some powerful Heavenly Monarchs were gone, so he did not attack.

"It seems that the powerhouses of the Demon Sound Sect have all been transferred back to the headquarters, so let's go to the headquarters of the Demon Sound Sect!"

As soon as Ye Tian's voice fell, his figure disappeared.

The headquarters of the Demon Sound Sect.

At this time, countless people in the entire sect were full of anger, this was anger at Ye Tian, and they wanted to kill Ye Tian.

But I have to admit that Ye Tian's strength is very strong, not only is his life-saving ability terrifying, but he also has a great realm shift, which is not an existence that can be easily killed.

But no one is afraid!

They are already much stronger than hundreds of millions of years ago, plus there are 36 True Monarchs, 104 half-step True Spirits, more than 6,000 Heavenly Monarchs, and hundreds of thousands of Divine Generals gathered here.

With such a huge scale of powerhouses, can't you deal with a Ten Thousand Laws Dao?

"Baili, can we really block the Great Realm of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi? If we can't block it, then all this will be in vain, and we will also lose some True Monarchs, no one wants to die, and so do we!"

Another ruler of the Demon Sound Sect, the Ten Thousand Eyes True Monarch, asked.

The Ten Thousand Eyes True Monarch has all kinds of eyes, each of which represents a secret technique, and his strength may not be as good as that of the Hundred Miles True Monarch, but the weirdness is even better.

Hundreds of millions of years ago, the Ten Thousand Eyes True Monarch was just a powerful Heavenly Monarch and did not grow up, but today's Ten Thousand Eyes True Monarch is extremely powerful.

He is also one of the true disciples of the Demon Yin Sect, and his status is no less than that of Baili Zhenjun.

"Ten Thousand Eyes, since we know that the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi has the Great Realm Shift, we have naturally made preparations. The True Ancestors also studied it for a long time, and even obtained the method of cracking it from the Dao Ancestors. The Great Realm Shift is very powerful, and it can be called the strongest escape technique among the Chaos Divine Powers, but no matter how powerful it is, it is only a Chaos Divine Power, not the Origin Divine Power! Some True Monarchs who are more against the sky are able to create a Origin Divine Power by leapfrogging the level, and in front of the Origin Divine Power, the Great Realm Shift is nothing. And the secret technique we obtained from the True Ancestor was a simplified method of the Origin Divine Power, combined with the ten True Monarchs, it was enough to exert one-tenth of the power of the Origin Divine Power that sealed the void. But even one-tenth of the power is enough to stop the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi from escaping!"

Baili Zhenjun said.

"I hope that secret art is reliable!"

Ten Thousand Eyes didn't say anything more.

He hadn't come into contact with that secret art, because cultivating that secret art required ten True Monarchs with different talents, and it required hundreds of millions of years of cultivation day and night.

He was not chosen, and although Baili Zhenjun did not go to cultivate, he was the person in charge, so he knew the power of that secret technique.

"Don't worry, if the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi dares to come, he will die! A mere half-step true spirit dares to enter our Demon Yin Sect, it's just too stupid! And he has stayed at the Heavenly Monarch level for so long, and he doesn't know what secret techniques he is cultivating, but no matter how much he accumulates the foundation at the Heavenly Monarch level, it is not of much use, and when it reaches the limit, it cannot be improved, and no matter how much he cultivates, he still cannot progress. It's like zero, he has cultivated for countless years, he has gone through an unknown number of eras, and he is in the same period as some Dao Ancestors, but what is the result? The powerhouses of his same era can kill him with a single look. Even when he entered the Great Universe, he was killed by Wanfa Daozi, which is ridiculous!"

Baili Zhenjun said with a smile.

While slowly waiting, the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ziye Tian finally came.
